commands: vp migrate --no-interactive --no-hooks # vite-plugin-* and unplugin-* packages keep their `vite` imports; a normal app gets them rewritten to vite-plus
cat packages/vite-plugin-demo/index.ts # PRESERVED: a vite-plugin-* package keeps `from 'vite'` so it stays usable by plain-vite projects
cat packages/unplugin-demo/src/index.ts # PRESERVED: an unplugin-* package keeps `from 'vite'` too
cat packages/app/src/main.ts # REWRITTEN: a normal app's `vite` import becomes `vite-plus`
